category.description: One of: correctness, security, performance, structure, testing, types, docs, style

rationale.description: Concrete failure scenario or maintenance cost

evidence.description: The actual code snippet (with file:line) that proves the issue exists; quote the lines you are flagging, not a paraphrase

suggested_fix.description: Concrete fix; empty string if none

verdict.description: Set only by a verifier pass; omit when first finding an issue

confidence.description: Optional 0-100 certainty; finders should only report issues they hold at >=80
